archive_data.question_text: Which of the following was one of the founders of the American spaceflight company "Virgin Galactic"?

explanation.english: Richard Branson is the founder of Virgin Galactic, which was established in 2004 as part of the Virgin Group. The company is focused on commercial space tourism.
explanation.tanglish: Richard Branson than Virgin Galactic oda founder. Idhu 2004 la Virgin Group oda arambikappattathu. Indha kambeni ulagam suzhal space tourism meythuvikkirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following state governments declared the 'Sushma Swaraj Award' for women in March 2022?

explanation.english: The Haryana Government announced the Sushma Swaraj Award in March 2022 to honour women achievers. It is named after former External Affairs Minister Sushma Swaraj.
explanation.tanglish: Haryana arasu 2022 March la mahilaigaluku Sushma Swaraj Award ye aarambithu. Idhu mun External Affairs Minister Sushma Swaraj oda peradaiyathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following was the President of the Lucknow session of the Indian National Congress in 1916?

explanation.english: Ambika Charan Majumdar presided over the 1916 Lucknow session of the Indian National Congress. The historic Lucknow Pact between Congress and Muslim League was signed during this session.
explanation.tanglish: Ambika Charan Majumdar than 1916 Indian National Congress oda Lucknow maanaatu adhyakshar. Indha maanaatule dhan Congress um Muslim League um serndhu Lucknow Sandi poturkaanga.
